description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, angular profile and a dark metallic finish. The frame and slide are predominantly black, while the grip panels are a contrasting brown, likely simulating wood or polymer. The slide is long and flat, with minimal external markings or embellishments, and the barrel extends slightly beyond the frame. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The grip is ergonomically shaped, with subtle contouring for comfort and control, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip. Overall, the handgun has a utilitarian, modern appearance suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian use.
description: A modern, semi-automatic handgun with a black metallic slide and brown ergonomic grip, featuring a long barrel and minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black slide, brown grip, and the flat magazine base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, squared slide profile, and the width of the trigger guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour and the uninterrupted slide surface.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the flatness of the slide and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a slightly angled, ergonomic shape with a smooth brown finish, likely simulating wood or polymer. It is contoured to fit the hand comfortably, with subtle finger grooves and a flat backstrap. The surface appears mostly smooth with minimal texturing, and there are no visible logos or embellishments. The grip panels are inset into the frame, providing a flush fit with the rest of the handgun.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured surface with no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is utilitarian, lacking any integrated accessories or reinforcement, and blends seamlessly into the frame.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, extending slightly beyond the slide, with a standard profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior is finished in black, matching the slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions, flaring, or finger rests. The design is simple and functional, with no logos or texturing apparent.
